description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular display panel supported by two vertical posts, with angled arms extending from the top for added stability or mounting. The front face displays a colorful, cartoon-style advertisement with the text 'RAD DAD!' and a stylized character in a suit and tie, set against a background of geometric shapes and pastel colors. The frame appears to be made of metal, painted in a muted blue-gray tone, and is relatively thick, providing structural support. The board is freestanding, designed to be placed on flat surfaces such as sidewalks or plazas. There are no visible illumination features or electronic components, suggesting it is a static, printed display. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A freestanding metal advertising board with a thick blue-gray frame and a colorful 'RAD DAD!' cartoon poster on the front. The board is sturdy, with angled support arms and a static printed display.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid blue-gray back panel and the two vertical support posts with angled arms extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the frame and the protruding angled support arms, with minimal visibility of the display content.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the vibrant 'RAD DAD!' advertisement and the full width of the supporting frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the frame's thickness and the angled arms, with no visible advertisement content.
attribute_frame_design: thick painted metal frame with straight edges and angular support arms
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster with cartoon character and 'RAD DAD!' text
